topic_starters.desire: I want to talk about desire. Lately I feel like something has changed.
topic_starters.communication: I need help communicating something that's hard for me to say.
topic_starters.couple_connection: I feel like my partner and I are drifting apart.
topic_starters.pleasure: I want to explore pleasure without shame.
topic_starters.boundaries: I find it hard to set boundaries in my relationships.
topic_starters.routine: I feel like we've fallen into a routine and I don't know how to break out.
topic_starters.self_connection: I want to reconnect with myself. I feel disconnected from what I need.
topic_starters.jealousy: Jealousy is affecting me and I don't know how to handle it.
topic_starters.curiosity: I'm curious about exploring new things but I don't know where to start.
topic_starters.body_confidence: I struggle to feel comfortable in my body and it affects my intimacy.
topic_starters.menopause: I'm going through menopause and I'm noticing changes that worry me.
topic_starters.erectile_dysfunction: I've been having problems with erection and I don't know how to handle it.
topic_starters.education: I want to understand sexuality better. I feel like I lack sexual education.
